hero.title: TAINOS CYBER CON
hero.tagline: Cybersecurity in the age of AI, cloud, and persistent threats

about.title: ABOUT
about.subtitle: Where cybersecurity meets the public
about.description: Tainos Cyber Con is an international cybersecurity awareness conference offering training, talks, and workshops. Our mission: provide equitable access to security solutions across all communities.
about.location_detail: 3235 Ave de la Gare, Mascouche, Room 2C2B

benefits.title: Threat Clarity
benefits.desc: Understand current risks and anticipate tomorrow's threats.

benefits.title: Practitioner Sessions
benefits.desc: Real cases and deployable tools presented by security professionals.

benefits.title: Timely Topics
benefits.desc: Content carefully selected based on industry trends.

benefits.title: Networking
benefits.desc: Connect with 50+ Quebec cybersecurity professionals and decision-makers.

items.title: When AI Becomes Cybercriminals' Weapon of Choice
items.desc: Deepfakes, automated phishing, adaptive attacks: understand the mechanics of these threats to better decide where to invest your defenses.

items.title: Defensive AI: Turning Cybersecurity into an Intelligent Immune System
items.desc: From the theory of behavioral detection to its concrete deployment within your infrastructure.

items.title: Regulation, Ethics and Trust: Building Responsible AI
items.desc: Translating compliance (Bill 25, GDPR, AI Act) into concrete technical requirements and reputational advantages.

items.title: Cybersecurity in the Quantum Era
items.desc: Why your current encryption will become obsolete, and how to start a post-quantum migration now.

items.title: The Risks of AI: Between Hype and Blind Spots
items.desc: Hallucinations, algorithmic bias, excessive dependency and loss of control: understanding the real dangers behind the promise of AI, and the safeguards to put in place before an incident occurs.

items.title: OT Security: Protecting the Connected Factory in the Age of Automation and AI
items.desc: The convergence of IT and OT worlds now exposes industrial systems, PLCs and production lines to unprecedented cyber threats. Understand how automation and AI both strengthen resilience and expand the attack surface, and adopt a protection strategy suited to critical environments.

items.title: Incident Response: From Detection to Recovery
items.desc: When a cyberattack strikes, every minute counts. Building an effective incident response capability: clear action plans, well-trained teams, forensic tools and crisis communication. How AI and automation accelerate detection and remediation, and why prior preparation determines success.

speakers.title: OUR SPEAKERS
speakers.subtitle: Announced progressively starting June 2026
speakers.cta_desc: Practitioners, researchers, and decision-makers — share your expertise with our community.
speakers.call_intro: We are launching the call for speakers for this edition of Tainos Cyber Con 2026. If you have knowledge, field experience, or research that can help our audience better understand, protect, and anticipate cybersecurity threats, your voice belongs on this stage.

confirmed.name: Mike Arbrouet
confirmed.title: Field CTO, IBM
confirmed.bio: Technology leader guiding organizations through the complexity of AI, cloud, and constant change. Builder of secure, scalable solutions and featured speaker at AFROTECH™ 2025.

confirmed.name: Blaise Arbouet
confirmed.title: Co-founder, YottaSec Inc.
confirmed.bio: Cyber Evangelist and information security governance expert. CISSP, C-CISO, ISO 27001. Co-founder of Tainos CyberCon and YottaSec Inc., focused on digital inclusion for developing nations.

confirmed.name: Valentin Bromont
confirmed.title: Incident Response Practice Lead, National Bank of Canada
confirmed.bio: Incident response and cyber crisis management expert. Leads the incident response practice at the National Bank of Canada, guiding organizations through complex cyber threats.

confirmed.name: Anglade Perrier
confirmed.title: Founder & vCISO, TEKAP
confirmed.bio: Cybersecurity and risk governance expert, Anglade Perrier is the founder of TEKAP, a Quebec-based firm specializing in vCISO services, compliance (CMMC, SOC2, ISO 27001), and risk management. Holding the ASC, C.Dir, and NACD.DC designations, he helps organizations protect their digital assets and strengthen their security posture.

why.title: Why attend this conference?
why.subtitle: One day. Four concrete benefits for you and your organization.

benefits.text: A clear read on 2026 threats: ransomware, offensive AI, cloud compromise — understand what's actually targeting you.
Multiple practitioner-led sessions with real-world cases and tools you can deploy the very next day.
Carefully curated topics that are current and directly relevant to your industry.
50+ Quebec cybersecurity professionals and decision-makers in one room — the ideal moment to build relationships that matter.

sponsors.title: PARTNERS
sponsors.subtitle: Become a Tainos Cyber Con 2026 partner
benefits: Targeted visibility to 200+ attendees over three months
